title: Files should end with a newline
description: This rule checks if all files end with a newline. Missing newline at the end of a file can cause issues with some tools.
message: File does not end with a newline.
recommendation: Ensure all files end with a newline.

noncompliant.description: Missing newline at the end of the script.

compliant.description: The script ends with a newline.

why_is_this_an_issue: Missing newline at the end of a file can cause issues with some tools.
how_to_fix: Add a newline at the end of the file.

metadata.title: Files should end with a newline
